title: HOME — visual hierarchy
subtitle: One screen, four conceptual rings of attention. The world-map background fades back so the centered stack pops forward.

regions.label: GLOBAL NAV
regions.note: Persistent shell across every page. Logo left, link group right, single high-contrast pill anchors the action.

regions.label: HERO STACK
regions.note: 14 px tracked eyebrow, 96 px display title, 24 px subtitle. Top-aligned single column = top-down read.

regions.label: NARRATOR
regions.note: Smaller, lower contrast. Sits BELOW the title — clearly subordinate.

regions.label: PRIMARY CTA
regions.note: The only saturated control on the page. Whitespace + color isolation = unmistakable next step.
